LightningComponentBundle.description: Payments page: KPI row, inbound wire feed (confidence + match-status badges), and contributions table. Fetches PaymentsController.getPayments and distributes data to presentational children.

property.name: periodMonths
property.label: Period (months)
property.description: Look-back window in months for the 'this period' contribution feed / KPI. Defaults to 18 so values are non-zero against seed data.
